case_title: CARPENTERS/DRYWALL INDUSTRY TRUST FUND vs. UNITED STRUCTURES INC.,

docket_entries.description: LABOR, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR     NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION AND      HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA;       CARPENTERS APPRENTICESHIP AND TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; THE FORTY-SIX       NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES DRYWALL INSTALLER    TRAINING TRUST FUND; CALIFORNIA DRYWALL/LATHING   INDUSTRY LABOR-MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE, INC.; THE DRYWALL INDUSTRY PROMOTION FUND AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED STRUCTURES INC. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-26-1993
CASE TERMINATED: 01-DEC-92 TERM CODE: D CASE DISMISSED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
